summary: Track monthly bills, log payments, and see what's still due this month.

introduced: New Bills workspace to track recurring bills with due dates, averages, and payment history
Log full or partial payments and advance due dates when a bill is fully paid
Monthly summary sidebar with calendar dots, due-soon totals, paid-this-month totals, and OK to spend
Expected monthly income setting for monthly balance calculations
changed: Bills and payments sync via iCloud CloudKit alongside notes and clipboard
CloudKit Development schema includes BillRecord and BillPaymentRecord record types
